description: Nordic health tech ecosystem and directory showcasing 226+ digital health startups from Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, and Iceland. Provides visibility, networking, and market access for Nordic health tech companies.
business_model: Ecosystem - Directory and network for health tech startups
target_market: Nordic health tech startups, investors, healthcare organizations
competitive_advantage: Comprehensive Nordic health tech overview, regional focus

varden_fit.rationale: Ecosystem resource - excellent source for Nordic market intelligence
